fields.summary: Specifies the design-space value for a single variable font axis.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` pairs a variation axis tag with a design-space value, forming one coordinate in the font's variation design position. Use a span of these values with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> to specify a custom location in the variation design space when cloning a typeface.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var coords = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
    {
        Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"),
        Value = 700f,
    },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { VariationDesignPosition = coords };
using var bold = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> identifying the axis, such as <c>wght</c> for weight.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
